name: @kamishino/kfc-plan-web
description: Standalone private plan UI CLI for Kami Flow projects.

scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.test:fast: npm --prefix ../.. run build:server && npm run build && node test/run.mjs --fast
scripts.test:integration: npm --prefix ../.. run build:server && npm run build && node test/integration-codex-runner.mjs
scripts.test:browser: npm --prefix ../.. run build:server && npm run build && playwright test
scripts.test:browser:headed: npm --prefix ../.. run build:server && npm run build && playwright test --headed
scripts.test:full: npm --prefix ../.. run build:server && npm run build && node test/run.mjs --fast && node test/integration-codex-runner.mjs
